'''pahuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbomb|headbomb]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbomb|headbomb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pahuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæhiyith|pæhiyith]] || [[word:pæhiyij|pæhiyij]] || [[word:pæhiyish|pæhiyish]] || [[word:pæhiyi|pæhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pahuhuyuth|pahuhuyuth]] || [[word:pahuhuyuj|pahuhuyuj]] || [[word:pahuhuyush|pahuhuyush]] || [[word:pahuhuyu|pahuhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pahuyuth|pahuyuth]] || [[word:pahuyuj|pahuyuj]] || [[word:pahuyush|pahuyush]] || [[word:pahuyu|pahuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pahufyuth|pahufyuth]] || [[word:pahufyuj|pahufyuj]] || [[word:pahufyush|pahufyush]] || [[word:pahufyuf|pahufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pahuyuthu|pahuyuthu]] || [[word:pahuyuju|pahuyuju]] || [[word:pahuyushu|pahuyushu]] || [[word:pahuyuku|pahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pahuyuth|pahuyuth]] || [[word:pahuyuj|pahuyuj]] || [[word:pahuyush|pahuyush]] || [[word:pahuyu|pahuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pahuyuthul|pahuyuthul]] || [[word:pahuyujul|pahuyujul]] || [[word:pahuyushul|pahuyushul]] || [[word:pahuyukul|pahuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pahuyuthuthu|pahuyuthuthu]] || [[word:pahuyujuju|pahuyujuju]] || [[word:pahuyushushu|pahuyushushu]] || [[word:pahuyuku|pahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pahuyuthun|pahuyuthun]] || [[word:pahuyujun|pahuyujun]] || [[word:pahuyushun|pahuyushun]] || [[word:pahuyukun|pahuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pahuyuthuoro|pahuyuthuoro]] || [[word:pahuyujuoro|pahuyujuoro]] || [[word:pahuyushuoro|pahuyushuoro]] || [[word:pahuyukuoro|pahuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
